description: Mary and Joseph's home town in Galilee
Jesus is born in Bethlehem, the City of David. Wise men visit.
The wise men come to Herod in Jerusalem. Herod seeks to kill the child Jesus.
Jesus and his family flee to Egypt to escape Herod's persecution. They stay there until Herod dies.
Jesus and his family return to Nazareth after Herod's death. Jesus grows up here.
